scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend ci && npm --prefix frontend run build

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Required for one-click deploy. Set a strong admin password. Advanced users can instead set `ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH` manually after deployment.

CODE_HASH_PEPPER.description: Required. Random secret used to hash share extraction codes. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

SESSION_SECRET.description: Required. Random secret used to sign admin sessions and short-lived download tokens. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY.description: Optional. Only required if you enable Turnstile in the admin settings.
